FR5-FM-01: contrast effortful first pass with later recognition
avoid too many new items at once
FR5-FM-02: mix consolidated and recently learned items
track items that remain unstable across spacing
FR5-FM-03: slow the pace until accurate recognition stabilizes
compare accurate slower and inaccurate faster responses
FR5-FM-04: group words by shared transferable pattern
verify recognition extends beyond a few memorized words
